modelling

model formation

age (months) as time

# base model: agemon as time
mod_yg_age <- lmer(zhfa ~ chsex + agemon + drwaterq_new +
                       chsex:agemon + chsex:drwaterq_new +
                       (1 | childid),
                     data = ethiopia_yg)
summary(mod_yg_age)
Linear mixed model fit by REML. t-tests use Satterthwaite's method [
lmerModLmerTest]
Formula: 
zhfa ~ chsex + agemon + drwaterq_new + chsex:agemon + chsex:drwaterq_new +  
    (1 | childid)
   Data: ethiopia_yg

REML criterion at convergence: 29522

Scaled residuals: 
    Min      1Q  Median      3Q     Max 
-5.0889 -0.4541  0.0349  0.4453  8.9836 

Random effects:
 Groups   Name        Variance Std.Dev.
 childid  (Intercept) 0.8349   0.9138  
 Residual             0.9570   0.9783  
Number of obs: 9400, groups:  childid, 1995

Fixed effects:
                       Estimate Std. Error         df t value Pr(>|t|)    
(Intercept)          -1.620e+00  4.329e-02  5.201e+03 -37.431  < 2e-16 ***
chsex2                1.029e-01  6.310e-02  5.264e+03   1.631    0.103    
agemon                2.532e-04  2.358e-04  7.483e+03   1.074    0.283    
drwaterq_new1         5.495e-02  3.662e-02  9.261e+03   1.501    0.134    
chsex2:agemon         1.542e-03  3.437e-04  7.503e+03   4.487 7.34e-06 ***
chsex2:drwaterq_new1  6.466e-02  5.349e-02  9.250e+03   1.209    0.227    
---
Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1

Correlation of Fixed Effects:
            (Intr) chsex2 agemon drwt_1 chsx2:
chsex2      -0.686                            
agemon      -0.472  0.324                     
drwatrq_nw1 -0.437  0.300 -0.110              
chsex2:agmn  0.324 -0.463 -0.686  0.076       
chsx2:drw_1  0.299 -0.445  0.075 -0.685 -0.121

follow-up (years) as time, with centred age included

Linear mixed model fit by REML. t-tests use Satterthwaite's method [
lmerModLmerTest]
Formula: 
zhfa ~ chsex + time + drwaterq_new + chsex:time + chsex:drwaterq_new +  
    age_first_c + (1 | childid)
   Data: ethiopia_yg

time                  3.451e-03  2.837e-03  7.470e+03   1.216    0.224
